/Users/gordie/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/em++ -flto -ffast-math -g0 -Werror -Wall -O3 -std=c++23 -Wno-error=limited-postlink-optimizations -DGL_SILENCE_DEPRECATION "--shell-file=/Users/gordie/Developer/C++ Projects/Complex_Final_Proj/cmakelists/emscripten/em_shell.html" -sUSE_WEBGL2=1 "--preload-file=/Users/gordie/Developer/C++ Projects/Complex_Final_Proj/shaders" --emrun -pthread -Wno-experimental -o "/Users/gordie/Developer/C++ Projects/Complex_Final_Proj/cmake-emscripten/index.html" @CMakeFiles/Fractal_Visualizer.dir/objects1.rsp -o Fractal_Visualizer.html @CMakeFiles/Fractal_Visualizer.dir/linkLibs.rsp
